# BigAl

> PostgreSQL-optimized TypeScript ORM

Built exclusively for Postgres. Type-safe fluent query builder, decorator-based models, and queries tuned for Postgres performance.

## Table of Contents

### Introduction

- [Getting Started](https://bigalorm.github.io/bigal/getting-started)

### Guide

- [Models](https://bigalorm.github.io/bigal/guide/models)
- [Querying](https://bigalorm.github.io/bigal/guide/querying)
- [CRUD Operations](https://bigalorm.github.io/bigal/guide/crud-operations)
- [Relationships](https://bigalorm.github.io/bigal/guide/relationships)
- [Subqueries and Joins](https://bigalorm.github.io/bigal/guide/subqueries-and-joins)
- [Views and Readonly Repositories](https://bigalorm.github.io/bigal/guide/views)

### Reference

- [API Reference](https://bigalorm.github.io/bigal/reference/api)
- [Configuration](https://bigalorm.github.io/bigal/reference/configuration)

### Advanced

- [BigAl vs Raw SQL](https://bigalorm.github.io/bigal/advanced/bigal-vs-raw-sql)
- [Known Issues](https://bigalorm.github.io/bigal/advanced/known-issues)

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://bigalorm.github.io/bigal/llms-full.txt): Complete documentation in a single file
